video_info.title: UEFA Europa League 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: Nottingham Forest will be desperate to overturn the deficit, while Midtjylland aim to protect their lead at home. The clash promises high drama, as both teams fight for a coveted quarter-final spot. Catch all the action from the UEFA Europa League 2025-26 match between FC Midtjylland and Nottingham Forest, LIVE & exclusively on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: UEFA Conference League 2025-26
video_info.shortDescription: AEK Larnaca host Crystal Palace in a tightly balanced Conference League clash, with both teams looking to push ahead in the tie after a goalless first leg. AEK have shown defensive strength throughout the competition, while Palace arrive hoping to convert their dominant first‑leg performance into a breakthrough. Can AEK make home advantage count? Tune in to catch all the action from UEFA Conference League 2025-26 Round of 16 Leg 2 as Crystal Palace take on AEK Larnaca, LIVE on Sony LIV.

video_info.title: Sitaare Zameen Par
video_info.shortDescription: After a DUI, an arrogant basketball coach must train neurodivergent adults for community service. His initial prejudice fades as his players show him a new perspective on life.
